articles.author: Eva Roytburg
articles.title: Wall Street dumped nearly $1 trillion in tech stocks by midday—then clawed it back and bought peanut butter and paint - Fortune
articles.description: A midday rout in the “Parabolic 7” chipmakers reversed by the close as money fled into the market’s dullest corners.
articles.content:
Today, the Nasdaq Composite looked like a V: down more than 4% by lunchtime, closing off just 1%. Nobody knows exactly why.
Around noon, the AI jitters came back, and traders dumped the highest-beta… [+2573 chars]

articles.author: Jon Brodkin
articles.title: Starlink charges $10 monthly hardware fee in move away from one-time purchases - Ars Technica
articles.description: Starlink, SpaceX's top moneymaker, also raised service prices by $5 to $10.

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store - TechCrunch
articles.description: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.
articles.content: For the first time, Apple will allow developers to partner with one another to offer subscription bundles through the App Store that would give users access to multiple apps at a lower price than if … [+1707 chars]
